description: Machine-readable freeze for the shared OPL managed-runtime three-layer owner envelope across admitted domains. It fixes the boundary between hosted runtime ownership, domain supervision ownership, and concrete executor ownership without becoming a runtime control plane.

owner_semantics.runtime_owner: Hosted runtime substrate owner responsible for session/run/watch/resume lifecycle.
owner_semantics.domain_owner: Domain supervision owner responsible for progress truth, quality gates, and recovery judgment.
owner_semantics.executor_owner: Concrete executor owner responsible for domain work output and local side effects.
